_comment: Bundle default policy. Workspace-level <workspace>/policy.json overrides any field set there. The persona_namespaces map is the namespace gate for cross-persona forge access — every standard persona may only register tool / skill names beginning with the prefix it owns. Empty string or persona missing from the map = wildcard (no gate, legacy behaviour). The dedicated `forge` and `skill-forge` personas are intentionally absent so they keep specialist open-access for ops + advanced workflows.
_comment_sandbox: persona_sandbox_overrides relaxes the strict default sandbox per persona. Today only the `network` axis is configurable: 'allow' lets a persona's forged tools share the host network namespace (loopback + outbound). Default for every persona without an entry: deny (no shared net). Only browser+research are listed because their entire purpose is web access; other personas keep the strict default and can opt in via workspace-level policy.json if needed.
